title: Merry Chirstmas !!!
content: Merry Christmas ครับ .. แล้วเจอกัน เมื่อผมมาเขียนละกัน .. :) Enjoy the festival have a wonderful and safe holidays!!! For the record, I think I should put up my **ultimate** wishlist in here. So that I have a reference for later years. :p **Cars** [*] "Mercury Cougar":http://www.mercuryvehicles.com/vehicles/cougar/ 1 [*] "Mazda MPV":http://www.mazdausa.com/mpv/ 1 [*] "Honda Prelue":http://www.hondacars.com/models/prelude/ 1 [*] "Ford Mustang GT Coupe":http://www.fordvehicles.com/cars/mustang/ 1 **Computers** [*] "Apple PowerBook G4":http://www.apple.com/powerbook/ 1 [*] "Apple PowerMac G4":http://www.apple.com/powermac/ 1 [*] "22" Apple Cinema Display":http://www.apple.com/displays/acd22/ [*] "Sony VAIO GR Notebook":http://www.sonystyle.com/vaio/gr/ [*] "Sony VAIO R505 SuperSlim Pro Notebook":http://www.sonystyle.com/vaio/r505/ 1 **Digital Imaing** [*] "Sony Cybershot DSC-F707 Digital Camera":http://www.sonystyle.com/digitalimaging/P_Feature_F707.shtml [*] "Sony MiniDV Handycam DCR-PC110":http://www.sonystyle.com/digitalimaging/P_Feature_PC110.shtml **PDA** [*] "Compaq iPAQ Pocket PC H3870":http://www.compaq.com/products/handhelds/pocketpc/H3870.html **Cellular Phone** [*] "Nokia 7650":http://www.nokia.com/phones/7650/ 1 Of course, these suppose to be the top-of-the-line model -- fully-loaded with options! :) * Also of course, I cannot afford any of those! * Also, I decide not to put up the price tags -- hurting too much. :p
